subcodes.first_line: The law of peace has come to stay. We are living in the radiant age of peace. We are daily advancing in the path of peace.
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @unity of governments; political unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
